issue_title: The basic information pop-up window is blocked by the table header
issue_body_preview:
### Self Checks

- [x] This is only for bug report, if you would like to ask a question, please head to [Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/xpert-ai/discussions/categories/general).
- [x] I have searched for existing issues [search for existing issues](https://github.com/xpert-ai/xpert/issues), in
test_description_zh: 在包含表格的页面中，将鼠标悬停或点击某行以触发基本信息弹出窗口，观察弹出窗口与表格表头之间的层级关系，检查弹出窗口是否完整显示在表头之上。
expected_result_zh: 基本信息弹出窗口应完整显示且不被表格表头遮挡，弹出窗口的 z-index 层级高于表头，内容可正常阅读和交互。
